task: fair graph learning (bias mitigation in attributed networks)
input: attributed network (graph with node features and labels)
output: debiased attributed network (modified graph structure and/or features)
backbone: model-agnostic preprocessing framework (not a GNN itself)
loss: bias mitigation objective (based on proposed bias metrics) + utility preservation constraint
key_idea: debias the input attributed network by optimizing novel bias metrics, independent of downstream GNN architecture
